query_normalized: the impact of text message tone on perceived emotional support psychology
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (a) and (b) because it empirically measures the impact of "tone formality" (a specific text message/chatbot tone) on "perceptions of friendliness and credibility" (proxies for perceived emotional support and social connection) within a communication context, directly addressing the core mechanism of how tone influences social perception.
